title: APS Jaipur Vacancy 2026, Apply for Teaching and Non-Teaching Posts -
short_info: APS Jaipur Vacancy 2026: Army Public School, Jaipur has issued a notification for the position of Various posts, including PGT History, PRT Computer Science, Counsellor, LDC, Receptionist, Lab Technician, Lab Attendant, Nursing Assistant, Assistant Librarian, Driver, and Aaya. The recruitment drive comprises 17 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to read the official notification and apply before 31-05-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the APS Jaipur Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.
